semanticEvent.description: Stephen Curry launches a difficult, contested three-pointer while leaning away from the defender.
Close-up reaction shot of Stephen Curry after the shot attempt, looking intense.
A stylish, greyscale edit showing Curry yelling with text overlay on screen.
Quick cut to a greyscale close-up of Curry looking shocked or frustrated with hands on his head.
Short clip of Curry's physical movement on court, maintaining the fast-paced edit style.
Extended slow-motion black and white shot of Curry running back and celebrating, looking like a highlight reel.
Close-up of Curry's face transitioning through stylistic video filters.
Rapid micro-cut of Curry's intense facial expression.
Extremely brief flash cut of Curry, likely part of an aesthetic beat-sync.
Final shot of Curry looking toward the crowd or bench, finishing the highlight sequence.
